---
title: "Projects"
---

<div class="page">

# Projects

<div class="card">
  <h3><a href="ice3.qmd">ICE³ — Multi-Century Global Glacier Evolution</a></h3>
  <p>Modelling the global multi-century evolution of glacier ice in 3D. <em>VUB, 2024–2025.</em></p>
  <span class="tag-pill">active</span> <span class="tag-pill">glaciology</span> <span class="tag-pill">modelling</span>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3><a href="ice-buffer.qmd">ICE-BUFFER — Glacier Buffering of Streamflow Droughts</a></h3>
  <p>Global glacier buffering of streamflow droughts in a changing climate using deep learning. <em>FWO/VUB, 2025–2028.</em></p>
  <span class="tag-pill">active</span> <span class="tag-pill">deep learning</span> <span class="tag-pill">hydrology</span>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3><a href="patagonia-hydrology.qmd">Western Patagonia Hydrology & Climate Change</a></h3>
  <p>PhD research: Assessing climate change impacts on freshwater sources to the coastal system of Western Patagonia. <em>UDEC, 2019–2023.</em></p>
  <span class="tag-pill">completed</span> <span class="tag-pill">hydrology</span> <span class="tag-pill">Patagonia</span>
</div>

<div class="card">
  <h3><a href="patagoniamet.qmd">PatagoniaMet — Hydrometeorological Dataset</a></h3>
  <p>A multi-source hydrometeorological dataset for Western Patagonia (40-56°S). Open data initiative. <em>2024.</em></p>
  <span class="tag-pill">completed</span> <span class="tag-pill">open data</span> <span class="tag-pill">dataset</span>
</div>

</div>
